calibration_metadata_hooks.source: src/rlrmp/analysis/pipelines/gru_perturbation_calibration.py DEFAULT_OPEN_LOOP_PEAK_DELTA_X_PER_UNIT, native conventions, and nominal-rollout controller feedback scale manifest

bulk_detail_manifest.contains: full per-run feedback-ablation rows plus full feedback checkpoint rescore checkpoint-score details

feedback_checkpoint_selection_audit.feedback_selection_policy: per-replicate minimum family-balanced signed-pair-aware absolute/excess feedback perturbation score
feedback_checkpoint_selection_audit.note: Feedback-selected checkpoints are reported for audit only. The primary materialization path still loads validation-selected checkpoints.

feedback_scoring_policy.family_balance: mean over families after within-family row/pair aggregation

penalties.command_oscillation_ratio: available when command horizon has >=3 steps
penalties.command_smoothness_ratio: available when command horizon has >=2 steps

feedback_scoring_policy.primary_policy_invariance: feedback audit is not a hidden selector; the effective checkpoint policy is whichever manifest the materializer is explicitly given
feedback_scoring_policy.response_cost: absolute paired full-Q/R/Q_f perturbation delta; excess positive delta is also reported so negative signed improvements cannot win by sign alone
feedback_scoring_policy.signed_pair_handling: rows with available +/- counterparts are averaged by signed_pair_key before family balancing; missing counterparts emit warnings

closed_loop_cmd_lateral_moderate.selection_leakage_guard: feedback-selected checkpoints are reported only in this sidecar; they become the effective loaded checkpoints only when materialized through an explicit fixed-bank checkpoint manifest
closed_loop_cmd_lateral_moderate.selection_policy: per-replicate argmin of family-balanced signed-pair-aware absolute/excess perturbation response score with nominal-quality gates and available command-energy/smoothness/oscillation penalties

feedback_scoring_policy.family_balance: mean over families after within-family row/pair aggregation
